title: Bridge Guard
description: Helps you with Speed Bridging by preventing falls if you place a block too early or forget to place one entirely.
body:
# Bridge Guard: A Speed Bridging Mod
![Bridge Guard Banner (Steve being saved from falling because of this mod)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/tJIC54V1/images/212d7b213601a416557bc09c22525d9196c78611.png)
## 📋 Overview:
<details>
<summary>🎮 Multiplayer</summary>

- This mod works in both single-player and multiplayer!

- **Important:** Confirm, that you are allowed to use this mod on the multiplayer server you are playing on, as it may be considered cheating.

</details>


<details>
<summary>❓ What It Does</summary>

This mod prevents you from falling if you either:
- Place a block too early or 
- forget to place it entirely. 

However, it does not prevent you from falling if you fail to sneak properly.

</details>


<details>
<summary>🚀 Getting Started</summary>

1. Bind the "Toggle Bridge Guard" key from the "Bridgeguard" category to a key of your choice.
2. Click that key _(a text should now tell you whether you switched the mod on or off)_
3. Have fun with the mod!

</details>



<details>
<summary>🔍 How It Works</summary>

- If you attempt to place the block too early, you will click the top of the target block, which means the block will not be placed, thus you will fall. (But the Mod will save you)

**Case 2:** 
- If you unsneak before placing the block, you will most likely fall. (But the Mod will save you)

**Other Scenarios:** 
- If you sneak too late, you will walk off the edge. (You will not be saved) 

(Note: This is not a safewalk mod.)

</details>

## ⚙️ Technical:

<details>
<summary>❌ Does it not work like you want it to?</summary>

_The Mod has to be toggled_

### No text appears, when you press the button:

Did you set the _correct keybinds_? (The mod is unbound by default)

### The game crashes:

Do you have all dependencies installed? (Fabric API)
Did you download the correct _mod version_ for your _game version_?

### Something Unrelated?

Suggest a Feature: [Click Here](https://github.com/Joboblock/Bridge-Guard/discussions/categories/ideas)

Request a Version: [Click Here](https://github.com/Joboblock/Bridge-Guard/discussions/categories/versions)

Open an Issue: [Click Here](https://github.com/Joboblock/Bridge-Guard/issues)

_(If your game crashes, please confirm, that the source of the Issue is this Mod)_

</details>

<details>
<summary>🧩 Explanation</summary>
  
When you sneak, the mod will force you to remain sneaking for at least 1 second. 
However, if you place a block during this time, the forced sneaking will be lifted.

</details>



<details>
<summary>📝 Examples</summary>

**Without Mod:**

1. Walk near the edge of the block.
2. Sneak.
3. Fail to place a block.
4. Unsneak.
5. Fall.

**With Mod:**

1. Walk near the edge of the block.
2. Sneak.
3. Fail/Forget to place a block.
4. Attempt to unsneak.
5. The mod forces you to sneak for at least 1 second.
6. You have time to react by either placing a block or stopping your movement.

</details>
